CustomField.description: The user can mark this as inactive by toggling the Active switch in the Rent Studio. Once a Rent Schedule is marked as "Inactive" any operations such as regeneration or creating new invoices for any rent slips under that schedule will be prohibited.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The user can mark this as inactive by toggling the Active switch in the Rent Studio. Once a Rent Schedule is marked as "Inactive" any operations such as regeneration or creating new invoices for any rent slips under that schedule will be prohibited.
CustomField.label: Active?
